mapper.sql: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, a.author_id, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.favorite_count, a.status, a.create_time, a.update_time, c.name as category_name, u.nickname as author_name, u.avatar as author_avatar FROM community_article a LEFT JOIN community_category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.author_id = u.id
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM community_article WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE community_article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_article SET like_count = like_count + #{increment} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_article SET comment_count = comment_count + #{increment} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_article SET favorite_count = favorite_count + #{increment} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_article WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = '1'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND status = '1'
